name: @frameforge/core
description: FrameForge rendering engine — deterministic browser-to-video pipeline + AI-powered video editing

scripts.preview:portrait: node dist/cli.js preview-edit --srt ../../examples/video-edit/captions.srt --word-timings ../../examples/video-edit/transcript.json --style bold-dark --caption-style bold-center --brand-color '#7c6cfc' --width 1440 --height 2560 -d 120 -o ../../examples/video-edit/output/preview-portrait.html && start ../../examples/video-edit/output/preview-portrait.html
scripts.preview:landscape: node dist/cli.js preview-edit --srt ../../examples/video-edit/captions.srt --word-timings ../../examples/video-edit/transcript.json --style bold-dark --caption-style bold-center --brand-color '#7c6cfc' --width 1920 --height 1080 -d 120 -o ../../examples/video-edit/output/preview-landscape.html && start ../../examples/video-edit/output/preview-landscape.html
scripts.render:test: node dist/cli.js edit "C:/Users/enriq/Videos/Claude Creatives Video/clips/reframed/clip-06-content-is-only-half-without-client-pipeline/reframed-9x16.mp4" --srt "C:/Users/enriq/Videos/Claude Creatives Video/clips/reframed/clip-06-content-is-only-half-without-client-pipeline/reframed-9x16_whisperx.srt" --style bold-dark --caption-style bold-center --brand-color '#7c6cfc' --quality fast -o ../../examples/video-edit/output/test-latest.mp4
scripts.agent:render: node dist/cli.js render-overlays "C:/Users/enriq/Videos/Claude Creatives Video/clips/reframed/clip-06-content-is-only-half-without-client-pipeline/reframed-9x16.mp4" --overlays ../../examples/video-edit/overlay-decisions.json --srt "C:/Users/enriq/Videos/Claude Creatives Video/clips/reframed/clip-06-content-is-only-half-without-client-pipeline/reframed-9x16_whisperx.srt" --caption-style bold-center --caption-position bottom --quality fast -o ../../examples/video-edit/output/agent-latest.mp4
